backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the implementation of early 2000s athletic/sports visual accents into the existing 1970s retro theme, listing affected files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of all frontend source files to short descriptions summarizing each file's role and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes used by shadcn-ui components.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React app titled 'The Daddy TGM' that mounts the app into a root div and loads the main TSX entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with five routes (Home, Reader, Archive, Soapbox, About) all wrapped in the Layout component.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Full-page layout wrapper rendering the Masthead, Navigation, diagonal stripe dividers for athletic accents, main content area, and a retro-styled footer with a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Masthead.tsx: Magazine masthead component featuring the main title with flicker animation, decorative repeating stripe borders, and two athletic diagonal stripe dividers for early 2000s sports energy.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive navigation bar with a diagonal stripe accent, active-state highlighting, athletic condensed font on mobile, and a collapsible hamburger menu for small screens.
frontend/src/components/PageRenderer.tsx: Renders individual magazine pages by content type (movie poster, comic strip, fake ad, review, letter, back page) using retro-styled layouts and ASCII art.
frontend/src/data/contentLibrary.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces and exported arrays of satirical content items (spoof movie posters, comic strips, fake ads, reviews, letters, back-page items) used to populate the magazine's pages.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and persisted identity state.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports retro/athletic Google Fonts, configures a 1970s earth-tone Tailwind CSS theme with custom OKLCH tokens, and defines reusable retro and athletic component utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Renders a satirical 'About Us' page with fictional staff bios and a humorous founding story for the retro magazine 'The Daddy TGM'.
frontend/src/pages/ArchivePage.tsx: Displays a list of archived magazine issues stored locally, allowing users to navigate to any past issue in the reader view, with the current day's issue saved on mount.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the magazine home page showing today's issue number, date, cover page, and teasers for the next four pages with type labels and snippet previews.
frontend/src/pages/ReaderPage.tsx: Renders the paginated magazine reader with navigation controls, displaying one of 50 generated issue pages at a time based on URL search params.
frontend/src/pages/SoapboxPage.tsx: Implements a retro-styled community message board where users can post, like, and reply to messages stored in localStorage with fake 70s-style usernames.
frontend/src/utils/issueGenerator.ts: Generates a deterministic 50-page issue by shuffling the content library pool using a seeded RNG, with page 50 always being a back page item.
frontend/src/utils/issueUtils.ts: Provides utilities for computing issue numbers and seeds from dates (relative to a 2024 epoch), archiving visited issues to localStorage, and formatting date strings.
frontend/src/utils/prng.ts: Implements a seedable mulberry32 pseudo-random number generator with helpers for shuffle, pick, pickN, and pickIndex operations.
frontend/src/utils/soapboxUtils.ts: Manages localStorage-backed soapbox posts and replies, including CRUD operations, like counting, fake 70s username generation, and relative timestamp formatting.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with a 1970s retro color palette, early-2000s athletic accents, custom font families, and standard shadcn/ui semantic color tokens.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state (version 5) for 'The Daddy TGM', a retro 1970s satirical online magazine built in pure HTML/CSS/JS, documenting architecture, existing features, known issues, and design notes including daily seeded issues, 50-page reader, spoof content pools, and localStorage-based community features.
